title: Establishment of Louisiana Library Resources Program
doc_html:
§32.  Establishment of Louisiana Library Resources Program

The Louisiana Library Resources Program is established.  The program shall be administered by the executive secretary (state librarian) of the State Library of Louisiana.  

Acts 1992, No. 210, §1.

§32.  Establishment of Louisiana Library Resources Program
